_description: Source of truth for visitor challenges. Distinct from experiments (which have hypotheses and data). Read by site-api (/api/challenges).

challenges.name: Sleep Stack Challenge
challenges.description: Screens off by 9pm, bed by 10pm, morning light within 30 min of waking. Seven days. No app needed — just a clock and a window.
protocol_steps: Set a 9pm alarm for screens off
Bed by 10pm — set the environment (dark, cool, quiet)
Morning: outdoor light within 30 min of waking, 10 min minimum
Track your bedtime and wake time (paper or phone notes)
challenges.what_to_watch: Sleep quality, energy on waking, bedtime consistency

challenges.name: No Alcohol, No Excuses
challenges.description: Two weeks completely dry. Track how your sleep, HRV, and energy change. Most people notice by day 4. The data doesn’t lie.
protocol_steps: Zero alcohol for 14 consecutive days
Note your sleep quality each morning (1-5 scale)
If you have a wearable, compare HRV and RHR before vs during
Journal the social situations where you’d normally drink
challenges.what_to_watch: REM sleep improvement, RHR drop, morning energy, social pressure patterns

challenges.name: Walk 5k Every Day
challenges.description: The lowest-barrier, highest-ROI habit in the stack. 250–400 calories burned per walk with zero recovery cost. Rain or shine, 30 straight days.
protocol_steps: Walk 5 kilometers (3.1 miles) every day for 30 days
Any pace counts — the goal is consistency, not speed
Rain, snow, or shine — no skip days
Track with phone GPS, smartwatch, or estimate by time (~45-60 min)
challenges.what_to_watch: Daily step count trend, weight trajectory, energy levels, mood

challenges.name: 7-Day Journal Sprint
challenges.description: Morning and evening journal for 7 days. Morning: intention + energy level. Evening: win of the day + what drained you. 5 minutes each.
protocol_steps: Morning (within 30 min of waking): write your intention for the day + rate energy 1-5
Evening (within 1 hour of bed): note your win of the day + what drained you
Keep it to 5 minutes max — brevity is the point
Paper, phone notes, or any app — the medium doesn’t matter
challenges.what_to_watch: Sleep onset (does writing before bed help?), morning clarity, pattern recognition

challenges.name: 14-Day Sugar Reset
challenges.description: No added sugar, no sweets, no desserts for 14 days. Fruit is fine. The first 3 days are the hardest — after that, cravings drop dramatically.
protocol_steps: Eliminate all added sugar, sweets, candy, desserts, sugary drinks
Whole fruit is allowed — the fiber changes the glycemic response
Read labels: sugar hides in sauces, bread, yogurt, granola
When a craving hits, eat protein or fat instead — it passes in 15 min
challenges.what_to_watch: Craving intensity (days 1-3 vs days 10-14), energy stability, CGM readings if available
